data.title: Grande Studios Announces Ethical AI Strategy to Guide the Future of Content Localization
data.description: On March 19, 2026, in Mexico City, Grande Studios unveiled a new corporate plan emphasizing the ethical integration of artificial intelligence (AI). The initiative prioritizes human capabilities, creative excellence, and industry responsibility in the incorporation of cutting-edge technologies.

data.title: As Travel Industry Fraud Surges, Nexion Travel Group Helps Advisors Stay Safe and Succeed
data.description: A top host agency in Irving, Texas is providing support to travel advisors by offering training, resources, and education to address the growing issue of scams. As of March 19, 2026, reports indicate a rise in fraudulent activities targeting travel advisors, prompting prominent industry organizations to advise agencies to stay alert to the escalating threat. The agency is equipping advisors with essential tools and knowledge to combat this trend and protect themselves from potential scams.

data.title: LISC Launches 2026 California Affordable Housing Development Training Institute (HDTI)
data.description: A program spanning across the state has been initiated to enhance the capacity of nonprofit developers. Over the course of 35 years, more than 600 practitioners have been trained through this program. Recently, the Local Initiatives Support Corporation (LISC), a significant community development financial institution, has kicked off the 2026 California initiative in Los Angeles on March 19, 2026.

data.title: Ammonium Nitrate Market Growing at 4.36% CAGR to Reach 58.19 Million Tons by 2031 Supported by Fertilizer Demand and Mining Applications, Reports Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of March 19, 2026, a recent report by Mordor Intelligence indicates a significant growth forecast for the global ammonium nitrate market. The report projects a rise from 53.43 million tons in 2026 to 58.19 million tons by 2031, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.36%. This trajectory is influenced by increasing regulatory measures...

data.title: Dogecoin aiming for $0.10 recovery despite bearish trend. Short-term target $0.095, medium-term $0.09-$0.10. Bullish breakout at $0.10, support at $0.092.
data.description: Summary of DOGE Price Predictions: In the short term, the target within the next week is $0.095. Looking ahead over the medium term, a range of $0.09 to $0.10 is forecasted for the next month. The bullish breakout level is set at $0.10, while the critical support level stands at $0.092. These predictions indicate potential fluctuations in the value of DOGE in the near future.

data.title: EnerCom Announces Initial List of Presenting Companies for the 31st Annual Energy Investment Conference to be held August 17-19, 2026, in Denver, Colorado
data.description: EnerCom Denver is celebrating its 31st year of bringing together companies, investors, analysts, and industry leaders at The Energy Investment Conference. Various presentation opportunities are open for E&P, Midstream, OFS, Minerals, and Energy Transition companies. Additionally, sponsorship opportunities are available for interested parties.
